current_suggestion.pitch: Your current health channels skew heavily toward carnivore and low-carb advocacy (Saladino, Chaffee, Ekberg), and Layne Norton is the most rigorous counterweight available — a PhD in nutritional sciences who systematically examines the actual study designs and effect sizes behind diet claims, including direct debates with carnivore proponents. He covers protein optimization, body composition, and metabolic research with a level of statistical literacy that Renaissance Periodization touches on for training but nobody in your feed applies to diet. Format is a mix of solo breakdowns, live Q&As, and occasional long-form interviews, consistently staying close to primary literature.
